commits.author: huangyexin-jk
commits.message: feat(API-10523): 线程池从PPS迁移到APS和定时任务和默认线程池池隔离

files.diff:
--- a/aps-app/src/main/resources/spring/threadpool/spring-threadpool.xml
+++ b/aps-app/src/main/resources/spring/threadpool/spring-threadpool.xml
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
        xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/task http://www.springframework.org/schema/task/spring-task.xsd">
     <!-- 从DB读取配置 -->
     <bean id="threadPoolInfoService" class="com.qihoo.finance.msf.threadpool.config.db.ThreadPoolInfoServiceImpl">
-        <property name="module" value="PPS"></property>
+        <property name="module" value="${aps.apollo.config.threadPoolInfoServiceModule:APS}"></property>
     </bean>
 
     <!-- 线程池状态统计 -->
@@ -26,4 +26,4 @@
         <task:scheduled ref="threadStateJob" method="run" cron="0 0/1 * * * ?"/>
         <task:scheduled ref="threadPoolUpdateJob" method="run" cron="0 0/1 * * * ?"/>
     </task:scheduled-tasks>
-</beans>
\ No newline at end of file
+</beans>

--- a/aps-app/src/main/resources/sql/thread_pool_aps_module_init.sql
+++ b/aps-app/src/main/resources/sql/thread_pool_aps_module_init.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+-- ============================================================================
+-- APS thread_pool module seed data
+-- ============================================================================
+-- Based on the PPS thread_pool rows supplied for APS scheduled-task executor
+-- isolation. Original ids are not copied because id is expected to be generated
+-- by the target database. The duplicate PPS credit_check_pool row is inserted
+-- once for APS.
+
+INSERT INTO `thread_pool` (`poor_code`, `module`, `core_size`, `max_size`, `keep_alive`, `queue_size`, `policy`) VALUES
+('pps-notice-pool', 'APS', 10, 100, 200, 10000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('task_default_pool', 'APS', 20, 100, 200, 10000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('loanmarket_pool', 'APS', 16, 64, 30, 1000, 'AbortPolicy'),
+('rj_send_award_pool', 'APS', 10, 20, 200, 100, 'AbortPolicy'),
+('batch_hit_pool', 'APS', 10, 20, 200, 1000, 'AbortPolicy'),
+('pps_lm_product_pool', 'APS', 10, 20, 20, 2000, 'AbortPolicy'),
+('push_contract_pool', 'APS', 4, 8, 80, 200, 'AbortPolicy'),
+('sms_delayed_pool', 'APS', 1, 2, 80, 200, 'AbortPolicy'),
+('credit-apply-pool', 'APS', 10, 100, 10, 10000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('loan-apply-pool', 'APS', 10, 100, 10, 10000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('pps_ev_product_pool', 'APS', 10, 20, 20, 200, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('tis_credit_pool', 'APS', 10, 20, 20, 200, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('tis_pull_file_pool', 'APS', 10, 20, 20, 200, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('evps_week_report_pool', 'APS', 10, 10, 20, 10000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('credit_check_pool', 'APS', 10, 100, 200, 1000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('evps_partner_credit_report_pool', 'APS', 9, 20, 60, 200, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('bs_chapter_content_download_pool', 'APS', 16, 100, 60, 1000, 'AbortPolicy'),
+('bs_record_batch_flush_pool', 'APS', 10, 50, 60, 200, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('pd_product_distribute_pool', 'APS', 10, 32, 100, 1000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+-- APS code references msf-default-pool, but the supplied PPS rows did not
+-- include it. Keep it aligned with task_default_pool unless operations has a
+-- different production value to copy.
+('msf-default-pool', 'APS', 20, 100, 200, 10000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+-- New pools used by scheduled-task executor isolation.
+('aps_task_execute_pool', 'APS', 20, 100, 200, 10000, 'CallerRunsPolicy'),
+('aps_task_long_pool', 'APS', 5, 20, 200, 1000, 'AbortPolicy');

commits.author: huangyexin-jk
commits.message: feat(API-10523): 下载文件的自动使用长任务

commits.author: huangyexin-jk
commits.message:
fix(JYSG-150949): 为支持线程池反射调用，新增接收包装类型Boolean参数的processThread重载方法

transition JYSG-150949 BUG_DEVELOP
